title: Smilatte 14 Ounce Unique Coffee Mugs, EM068 Novelty Marble Ceramic Cup with Large Handle for Home and Office, Microwave Dishwasher Safe, Set of 4, Gray
features: Coffee mug dimensions: 3.1 inches in diameter and 4.5 inches high. Set of 4, each marble mug 14oz. Perfect for coffee, tea, cocoa, cappuccino and more. Is your ideal marble mug.

Unique design big handle-easy grip handle and elegantly unique marbleized pattern on every mug, no two mugs are like. The mugs you receive will be similar to the ones in the photo, variances occur in the Marbleized Patterns due to the individual craftsmanship of these mugs.

Professional porcelain-Made of high quality marble ceramic, Durable and easy to clean, lead-free and non-toxic. Safe for dishwasher, microwave, oven and freezer. Daily use in all settings, Easy to clean, Durable and light weight, Safely packed for shipping.

The perfect mug gift-It is packaged in a well-wrapped box, a perfect gift for your friends and family in any occasion such as Housewarming, Wedding Party, Mothers' Day, Fathers' Day, Christmas and New Year's Day, or just without any special reason
30-day No-Chip warranty-Smilatte will offer a free replacement or refund if anything goes wrong with the product.
description: Product Description SMILATTE 14 OZ MARBLE COFFEE MUGS Smilatte' s idea is transmitting the living idea of health, interest, and the high quality to the customers. We will remain committed to this idea and continue to produce kitchenware with high quality and creativity. Did you drink coffee in the morning? The unique marble mug has a large handle and is very smooth and comfortable to touch. Four packs, very suitable for drinking coffee with family and friends. Make a Fun Gifts Each cup has its unique pattern, very beautiful, very suitable for making a unique gift for parents, relatives, friends, etc. Easy to Clean The smooth ceramics are not easy to remain coffee stains during use, so there is no need to worry about cleaning troubles caused by long-term storage of coffee. High-Quality Ceramics Durable and easy to clean, AB-grade marble ceramic.Safe for the dishwasher, microwave, oven and freezer! Sturdy and durable, these mug sets can easily handle daily use in your kitchen.
